top.name: Spell Storm
top.rules_text: Cast the top halves of the top 3 cards of your deck for free, targeting enemies of your choice. Then discard them.

bottom.name: Arcane Convergence
bottom.rules_text: This turn: each spell you cast also casts the top half of the next card in your deck for free.

upgrades.description: Storm casts more. Convergence also banks charge.

changes.value: Cast the top halves of the top 4 cards of your deck for free. Then discard them.
This turn: each spell you cast also casts the top half of the next card for free, and banks 1 charge.
Cast the top halves of the top 5 cards of your deck for free. Then discard them.

upgrades.description: Cascade Convergence: triggered casts can use either half.

changes.value: This turn: each spell you cast also casts a half of the next card for free, and banks 1 charge.

upgrades.description: Maelstrom of Spells: the cast cards return to your hand instead of discarding.

changes.value: Cast the top halves of the top 5 cards of your deck for free. They return to your hand.

upgrades.description: Chain Convergence: triggered casts can themselves trigger (one extra link).

changes.value: This turn: each spell casts a half of the next card free (which may trigger once more). Bank 1 charge per trigger.

upgrades.description: The Eye of the Storm: cast both halves of the top 5 cards.

changes.value: Cast both halves of the top 5 cards of your deck for free. They return to your hand.

upgrades.description: Perfect Convergence: every cast also casts both halves of the next card.

changes.value: This turn: each spell you cast also casts both halves of the next card free (which may chain once). Bank 1 charge per trigger.
